requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire-Safety and Local Installation Review
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全与当地安装审查
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全與當地安裝審查

summary.en: North Macedonia BESS projects may need municipal fire brigade review, building authority review, occupational-safety review, insurer review, and project-owner review in addition to CE-oriented product evidence. Fire expectations are generally implemented through site design, fire detection and suppression design, ventilation or gas-management, emergency shutdown, separation distances, and commissioning documentation rather than a single confirmed whole-unit national BESS fire certificate.
summary.zh: 北马其顿BESS项目除产品级CE对齐证据外，可能还需要地方消防队、建筑主管机关、职业安全、保险方及项目业主的审查。消防要求通常通过现场设计、火灾探测和灭火设计、通风或气体管理、紧急停机、间距及调试文件来处理，而非单一已确认的整机国家级BESS消防证书。
summary.zht: 北馬其頓 BESS 項目除產品級 CE 對齊證據外，可能還需要地方消防隊、建築主管機關、職業安全、保險方及項目業主的審查。消防要求通常透過現場設計、火警探測與滅火設計、通風或氣體管理、緊急停機、間距及調試文件來處理，而非單一已確認的整機國家級 BESS 消防證書。

standards_or_laws: North Macedonia fire code and municipal fire-safety framework
Local fire-authority, municipality, insurer, and project-owner fire-safety review

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558, and project fire-design review for stationary energy storage. These documents can support a North Macedonia fire-safety file but do not replace North Macedonia local fire-authority or site-acceptance expectations.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及项目消防设计审查管理固定式储能。这些文件可支持北马其顿消防安全资料包，但不能替代北马其顿地方消防主管机关或现场批准要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據 GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558 及項目消防設計審查管理固定式儲能。這些文件可支持北馬其頓消防安全資料包，但不能取代北馬其頓地方消防主管機關或現場批准要求。

gap.en: Prepare a site-specific fire dossier: cabinet layout, cell chemistry, thermal-runaway mitigation, fire detection and suppression concept, ventilation or gas-hazard analysis, spacing, access routes, emergency shutdown, water-runoff or contamination controls where relevant, commissioning tests, and North Macedonia-aligned emergency procedures.
gap.zh: 应准备场站特定消防资料包：柜体布局、电芯化学体系、热失控缓解、火灾探测和灭火方案、通风或气体危险分析、间距、通道、紧急停机、适用时的消防水外排或污染控制、调试测试及北马其顿语应急程序。
gap.zht: 應準備場站特定消防資料包：櫃體佈局、電芯化學體系、熱失控緩解、火警探測與滅火方案、通風或氣體危險分析、間距、通道、緊急停機、適用時消防水外排或污染控制、調試測試及北馬其頓語應急程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where North Macedonia building, municipality, occupational-safety, insurer, or local fire-authority review applies; no confirmed blanket national whole-unit BESS fire certificate is stated here
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, local fire review, and procurement requirements

source.publisher: Government of North Macedonia, State fire-safety and municipal authorities

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product safety evidence alone is not enough for North Macedonia BESS fire review. Treat fire design and local installation acceptance as project-specific approval items.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品安全证据本身不足以覆盖北马其顿BESS消防审查。应将消防设计和当地安装验收作为项目特定批准事项处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品安全證據本身不足以涵蓋北馬其頓 BESS 消防審查。應將消防設計與當地安裝驗收作為項目特定批准事項處理。
